name: task-loop
description: Task-loop setup, preflight, specify-aims, and create-cycle scaffolding support for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Setup, proposal aims, and create-cycle scaffolding for task-loop in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Use Task Loop to configure the hosted Supabase task board, save local credentials, register a repository, verify setup, author the initial proposal with specify-aims, and create-cycle scaffolding. Codex support is rolling out in phases; run-cycle remains pending.
defaultPrompt: Set up task-loop for this repo.
Specify aims for this task-loop project.
Create cycle scaffolding for this task-loop project.
